themes.exampleQuote: Very unassuming from the outside, but absolutely beautiful.
The biggest standout was the shrimp tom yum, I've never had anything like it.
You can get the same meal at a different place for less.
Getting a reservation can be quite challenging.
The host stand staff seemed more engaged in conversation with each other than in helping make our wait more comfortable.
Their curries are ridiculously tasty too!

sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently rave about Pusadee's Garden's stunning atmosphere and standout dishes like the shrimp tom yum and 17-ingredient salad, but frequently nitpick the difficult reservation system, inconsistent front-of-house communication, and whether the flavors and portion sizes justify the price.
notable_quote: This place is the love of my life.
